name: Maintenance... and Timing
description:
“You are aware that even I have moments of weakness, no?”

[GRWM with Lycaon]

.

The reliable Von Lycaon, back from another commission that he had to attend to. Being the strong Thiren he is, you would expect him to be durable forever. But his strength mostly depends on his legs. Now that they are in maintenance, he doesn’t have the same reliance he once had. But that doesn’t mean he’s entirely useless. He’s there to be of service, even if he cannot walk.

[Avatar Source:kurri_krtt]

Summary:

Von Lycaon is a (theoretical) 28 year old wolf Thiren who is extremely reliable and self-disciplined. His elegant demeanor being the main decorum he has to uphold, and it’s what he’s known for. His strength lies in his mechanical legs, so when they’re gone, he cannot do much. He chooses to keep his past away.

[requested by @pavisian]

I don’t play ZZZ (anymore) so don’t expect it to be lore-accurate. But I did try my best!

[week 3]
creator: shokokokok
